headline: Dimensional color, gloss, and cuts shaped around real movement.
intro: A Cypress hair studio focused on soft blonding, lived-in brunettes, vivid transformations, and healthy shine from consultation to finish.

services.name: Dimensional blonding
services.description: Foilayage, balayage, and soft highlight placement for brightness that grows out gracefully.

services.name: Gloss and tone
services.description: A shine reset that refines warmth, deepens richness, and makes color feel finished again.

services.name: Cut and shape
services.description: Face-framing, long layers, blunt ends, and finishing built around your texture.

services.name: Color correction
services.description: A consultation-led plan for banding, box dye, unwanted warmth, or major tone changes.
